sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10153" key="a)ntimeta/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμετ-άγω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ᾰγ]</foreign>, <sense id="n10153.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">countermarch,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λόχον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:33:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33.6</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">press in contrary direction,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:8:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.8.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
